assertions.description: VREG1 (LM1117-3.3, lib: Regulator_Linear:LM1117-3.3) is correctly identified as a power_regulator but topology is 'unknown', estimated_vout is null, and input_rail/output_rail are both null. The component value 'LM1117-3.3' explicitly encodes the output voltage (3.3V) and the lib_id confirms it is a fixed linear regulator. The analyzer should parse the '-3.3' suffix and emit topology='fixed_linear' with estimated_vout=3.3. Additionally, pins=[] for VREG1 in the KiCad 5 legacy format means pin-to-net connectivity was not parsed, which is why input/output rails could not be traced — this is a secondary root cause.
